text: Peel away from your fingers so you don't get cut.
And once you're done peeling one side, you start peeling the other.
And once you're done peeling that side, you turn it over to peel this side.
And once you're done with the whole side, you just turn it over to peel that side.
And then you have to do the top, which is the hard part.
You just peel it like that.
Most of the potatoes I peeled have eyes.
And this time, we're going to try not to make it chunky.
